ddls:
CREATE TABLE "providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare service provider */,
  "address_1" TEXT /* Primary address line */,
  "address_2" TEXT /* Secondary address line */,
  "town_city" TEXT /* Town or city where the provider is located */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the provider is located */,
  "postcode" TEXT /* Postal code of the provider's location */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the provider */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL for the provider */,
  "local_authority" TEXT /* Local authority responsible for the provider */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the provider operates */,
  "also_known_as" TEXT /* Any other names by which the provider is known */,
  "provider_type" TEXT /* Type of provider (e.g., care home, homecare agency) */,
  "provider_rating" REAL /* Rating of the provider */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the provider was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the provider's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the provider offering the service */,
  "specialisms_services" TEXT /* Specialisms or services offered by the provider */,
  "service_types" TEXT /* Type of services offered (e.g., Residential homes, Homecare agencies) */,
  "service_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the service */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the service */,
  "service_status" TEXT /* Status of the service (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_services_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspections" (
  "inspection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspection */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the provider being inspected */,
  "cqc_provider_id" TEXT /* CQC Provider ID for internal use */,
  "cqc_location_id" TEXT /* CQC Location ID for internal use */,
  "report_publication_date" TEXT /* Date when the inspection report was published */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the inspection report */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given to the provider based on the inspection */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the inspection report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspections_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who has the permission */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the user (e.g., view providers, edit services) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the service category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_specialisms" (
  "specialism_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specialism */,
  "specialism_name" TEXT /* Name of the service specialism */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specialism_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_tracking" (
  "tracking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance tracking record */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the provider being tracked */,
  "compliance_type" TEXT /* Type of compliance being tracked */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Status of the compliance (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the compliance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tracking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_tracking_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_provider" (
  "report_provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report-provider relationship */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_provider_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_provider_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_provider" (
  "service_provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service-provider relationship */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the service */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_provider_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_provider_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id")
)
